items.title: Solana is shedding its memecoin reputation as big banks move billions into its ecosystem
items.whyYouShouldCare: The influx of capital from major banks into Solana indicates a shift towards institutional acceptance, enhancing SOL's credibility and potential for increased liquidity.

items.title: Goldman Sachs exits XRP, Solana ETF exposure in Q1 2026
items.whyYouShouldCare: Goldman Sachs' exit from XRP and Solana ETF exposure may signal a reevaluation of risk in crypto assets, impacting market perception and investment strategies around SOL.

items.title: Bitwise to add HYPE to balance sheet using fees from Hyperliquid ETF
items.whyYouShouldCare: Bitwise's decision to add HYPE to its balance sheet through Hyperliquid ETF fees could boost ecosystem usage and liquidity, benefiting Solana's overall market dynamics.
